Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Eggless recipes

Health · asked by user [] · 2007-05-24 · 7 answers
haribol, i am new at Krishna consciousness and vegetarianism and would like to learn substitutes for egg recipes.
thank you
user [2]
Allow me introduce you to this wonderful blog where you can find superb chef satoxi : http://satoxi.com/tag/recipes/
also it is very easy to cook the regular foods like cake, etc.. just substitute every egg in the given recipe for two spoonsfuls of yoghourt and it will come same delicious plus karma free! Krishna prasadam ki jaya!
user [39]
I am sorry I can't be of much help here, but have you tried to Google "eggless baking"? You'll be surprised at the amount of useful information and recipes you'll find. A few devotee ones will come up too! :)
user [2]
sponge cake recipe, then you add the rest.
see below
user [2]
sorry, I used translator,
it actually should read "baking powder"
corrected above
user [39]
Ok, what is "chemical leavening"?
user [39]
>it actually should read "baking powder"
Ha ha, "chemical leavening"! Lol I should have guessed there was an ingredient missing :)
user [40]
There is a book called Book of Egg Free Cakes
http://www.thekrishnastore.com/Detail.bok?no=614&bar=
I have it but my oven is broken so I haven't tried any
I need to do a review of it for here
http://www.food.krishna.com/node/102
there are many web sites with free recipes
